# Chat: multi-turn conversations

<!-- source: 04-llm-from-api.qmd section "Multi-turn conversation" -->

Using `chat_openrouter`, `live_console`/`live_browser`, and why multi-turn chat is more prone to context poisoning than a single well-prepared prompt.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge comparing a single detailed prompt vs the same info split over several turns.
:::
